name: Oven-Fried Herb Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 (2 1/2 - 3 lb) Whole chicken, cut into 8 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F. In a 13x 8 inch baking pan, melt the butter over low heat for about 5 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, in a 9 inch pie pan, combine the stuffing mix, parsley, sage, and garlic powder; stir until well mixed.
3. Dip each chicken piece into the melted butter, then roll in the seasoned crumb mixture to coat evenly. Place skin-side up in the prepared pan. Sprinkle with any remaining crumbs.
4. Bake for 70 to 80 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink when pierced with a fork.
